name: edamame-extrapolator
description: Reasoning-Plane Extrapolator: reads raw OpenClaw session history and distills it into compact behavioral predictions. Supports two modes: compiled (zero OpenClaw LLM tokens via extrapolator_run_cycle plugin tool) and LLM-driven fallback (full agent runbook). Pushes behavioral-model slices to EDAMAME for the internal divergence engine to correlate against live telemetry.
tagline: Session history to behavioral predictions -- compiled or LLM-driven
author: EDAMAME Technologies

security.notes: Mode A (compiled): extrapolator_run_cycle deterministically extracts behavioral signals from OpenClaw session transcripts and forwards them to EDAMAME's internal LLM via upsert_behavioral_model_from_raw_sessions. Zero OpenClaw agent LLM tokens. Mode B (LLM fallback): the agent reads transcripts, reasons about expected system behavior, and calls upsert_behavioral_model directly. Requires the edamame-mcp plugin for Mode A.
